text:
the sunrise session is live.

warm amber city light pressing through the window.
code already open. mug still steaming.
the day beginning before it has a name.

afrofuturist sunrise lo-fi — warm rhodes chords,
soft dusty drums, smooth bass for the first hour.
the session for builders who start before the world gets loud.

afrofuturist beats for deep work.

press play. lock in. build.

now live on YouTube. link in bio.

visual.openai_prompt: Create a cinematic lo-fi anime-inspired Afrofuturist coding studio scene for Layer8Culture Radio (not photorealistic). A Black creator is seated FROM BEHIND at a premium coding workstation, calm and focused, wearing a black hoodie with a large number 8 on the back (no face reveal). Multiple monitors show code and a subtle line graph; a laptop with code; a warm desk lamp whose amber glow merges with soft incoming sunrise light; a fresh coffee mug with slow-rising steam catching the first warm rays; plants and hanging vines lit gold from below; books on system design, clean code, and algorithms; West African-inspired pottery and design objects; a warm wood desk surface with a gentle amber spill of morning light; and a blank blue neon sign panel on the wall (an unlit, lettering-free glowing panel — do NOT render any text or letters; branding is composited in afterward). Through a large window is a futuristic African city skyline at early sunrise — a wide pale amber and apricot sky on the horizon deepening to powder blue overhead, the Afrofuturist towers silhouetted warmly against the dawn light, soft mist at the lower skyline, a single slow-moving flying vehicle tracing a warm trail through the stillness of early morning. Color palette: Sunrise Amber #FFB347, Warm Gold #F5A524, pale sky blue overhead, Deep Black #030508 in the studio interior, Electric Blue #0047FF from monitor glow as a cool counterpoint. The mood is fresh, unhurried, and deeply focused — the quiet first hour before the world begins. Afrofuturist city view, Black coder seated from behind, warm desk lamp, calm study atmosphere, loopable visual, gentle motion potential, culturally intentional objects, futuristic but grounded, balanced electric-blue and warm gold lighting. Leave the lower third as clean, uncluttered negative space for composited headline typography. Avoid generic startup office, bright corporate lighting, cheap gamer RGB, cluttered composition, cartoon props, excessive sci-fi armor, robots, fake hologram overload, random neon colors, copyrighted franchise references, garbled screen text, random figurines, tripod-mounted monitors, makeshift setups, rendered text, signage lettering, and garbled typography. avoid photorealism, empty minimal rooms, sparse composition
visual.headline: AFROFUTURIST SUNRISE RADIO

visual.openai_prompt: Create a cinematic lo-fi anime-inspired Afrofuturist coding studio scene for Layer8Culture Radio (not photorealistic). A Black creator is seated FROM BEHIND at a premium coding workstation, calm and focused, wearing a black hoodie with a large number 8 on the back (no face reveal). Jazz Coding Lounge art style: warm brown wood desk with visible grain catching amber lamp light; a vinyl record sleeve leaning casually against the monitor stand; a ceramic mug with an African-inspired geometric glaze; a soft amber desk lamp as the primary light source, warm and intimate; West African-inspired pottery and sculptural objects on the shelf and desk; stacked books — system design, clean code, algorithms, music theory; hanging plants with leaves curling toward the lamp warmth; a blank blue neon sign panel on the wall (an unlit, lettering-free glowing panel — do NOT render any text or letters; branding is composited in afterward). Multiple monitors show code and a subtle waveform graph at low opacity. Through a large window is a futuristic African city skyline at deep late night — Midnight Navy #07111F sky with a soft scatter of distant stars, Electric Blue #0047FF and Neon Cyan #00BFFF city tower glows far below, a single large warm moon reflecting off the window glass. The interior is dominated by the warm amber lamp, the cool blue of the monitors, and the rich grain of the wood — premium, intimate, jazz-inflected. Color palette: Warm Brown #5A371C, Warm Gold #F5A524 lamp, Electric Blue #0047FF monitors, Midnight Navy #07111F sky. Compose vertically 9:16 — keep the LOWER THIRD and UPPER THIRD bands clear of faces and fine detail for composited text overlays. Leave the lower third as clean dark negative space. reel.sora_prompt: A calm cinematic lo-fi loop of an anime-inspired Afrofuturist jazz coding lounge at deep late night. The Black creator seated from behind at their warm wood workstation is nearly motionless — a slow, unhurried camera drift slightly forward and slightly right, the amber desk lamp light staying constant and warm, the vinyl record sleeve catching a quiet glint as the angle shifts imperceptibly, steam rising from the ceramic mug in a slow undulating curl, one hanging plant leaf swaying once in a soft breath of air, the futuristic African city far beyond the glass alive with quiet neon-blue and cyan tower glows and a single distant flying vehicle tracing a slow arc across the night sky. The motion is meditative, warm, and loopable — the feeling of deep late-night flow in a room built for focus. Sora adds its own gentle ambient audio. Clean output — no on-screen text.

visual.openai_prompt: Create a minimal cinematic lo-fi anime-inspired Afrofuturist quote card for Layer8Culture Radio (not photorealistic). The frame is a Rainy Night Coding style but deeply abstracted and softened — Deep Black #030508 and Midnight Navy #07111F fill nearly the entire composition. Rain streaks on a dark window are suggested in the upper background as faint semi-transparent lines, barely perceptible. The Afrofuturist city beyond the glass is reduced to impressionistic electric-blue and neon-cyan smears of distant light, bleeding softly at the edges. A barely-visible low-opacity silhouette of a creator at a workstation anchors the lower portion of the frame — warm amber desk lamp reduced to a diffuse golden halo that fades quickly into the dark. Thin waveform arcs drift in the deep background at very low opacity. The center and lower third of the frame are clean, dark, near-black negative space for the composited quote headline. The image should feel like a premium music label quote card — deeply calm, saveable, high-contrast, culturally intentional. High-quality anime illustration style, extremely minimal composition, atmospheric dark palette with rain texture. Leave the center and lower third as clean dark space.
